title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node & browsers; same API surface as the Python client.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration that wraps Ollama models for chains, agents, retrieval, and tool-calling.

title: ollama-webui (ollama-webui/ollama-webui)
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama—chat UI, model management, multi-user, OpenAI-compatible endpoint.

title: ollama-cli (go-llama.cpp wrapper)
summary: Lightning-fast CLI to pull, run, and manage GGUF models; built on go-llama.cpp with CUDA & Metal.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension bringing local Ollama models into GitHub Copilot-style inline suggestions.

title: chainlit-ollama
summary: Chainlit cookbook for turning any Ollama model into an interactive chat app in 20 lines.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Ray AIR example notebook building a RAG pipeline with Ollama embeddings + Llama-2 7B Q&A.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU & PVC support.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix flake packaging Ollama and common models for reproducible, cached installations.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that calls local Ollama models for summarizing notes, brainstorming, and translation.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with Spring Boot starters and reactive (WebFlux) support.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET SDK for Ollama with async/await, streaming, and minimal API samples for ASP.NET Core.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration letting you use Ollama models as generators or embedders in pipelines.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Rust crate providing strongly-typed, async bindings to the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-host Discord bot that brings local LLMs into any server via slash commands and threads.

title: ollama-django
summary: Django package adding Ollama model support to the admin interface for instant chat & completion demos.

title: ollama-streamlit
summary: Streamlit cookbook app showing how to stream Ollama responses into a chat interface with session state.

title: ollama-rustic
summary: Alternative Rust client focused on minimal dependencies and WASM compatibility for browser usage.
